# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: cicd-docker-builder
  namespace: build
  labels:
    app: docker-builder
    team: cicd
    purpose: automated-deployments
  annotations:
    description: "CI/CD pod for building and pushing Docker images"
spec:
  serviceAccountName: cicd-builder-sa
  hostNetwork: false
  hostPID: false
  securityContext:
    runAsUser: 0
    runAsGroup: 0
    fsGroup: 999
  containers:
    - name: docker-builder
      image: docker:24.0-dind
      imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
      securityContext:
        privileged: true
        runAsUser: 0
        allowPrivilegeEscalation: true
        capabilities:
          add:
            - SYS_ADMIN
            - NET_ADMIN
          drop:
            - ALL
      env:
        - name: DOCKER_HOST
          value: "unix:///var/run/docker.sock"
        - name: DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR
          value: ""
        - name: DOCKER_BUILDKIT
          value: "1"
        - name: CI_REGISTRY
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: cicd-config
              key: registry-url
        - name: CI_REGISTRY_USER
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: registry-credentials
              key: username
        - name: CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: registry-credentials
              key: password
      ports:
        - name: docker-daemon
          containerPort: 2375
          protocol: TCP
        - name: docker-tls
          containerPort: 2376
          protocol: TCP
      resources:
        requests:
          cpu: "500m"
          memory: "1Gi"
          ephemeral-storage: "10Gi"
        limits:
          cpu: "2"
          memory: "4Gi"
          ephemeral-storage: "50Gi"
      volumeMounts:
        - name: docker-socket
          mountPath: /var/run/docker.sock
        - name: docker-storage
          mountPath: /var/lib/docker
        - name: workspace
          mountPath: /workspace
        - name: docker-config
          mountPath: /root/.docker
          readOnly: true
      readinessProbe:
        exec:
          command:
            - docker
            - info
        initialDelaySeconds: 10
        periodSeconds: 10
        timeoutSeconds: 5
        failureThreshold: 3
      livenessProbe:
        exec:
          command:
            - docker
            - info
        initialDelaySeconds: 15
        periodSeconds: 30
        timeoutSeconds: 5
        failureThreshold: 5
      lifecycle:
        preStop:
          exec:
            command:
              - /bin/sh
              - -c
              - "docker system prune -f && sleep 5"
  volumes:
    - name: docker-socket
      hostPath:
        path: /var/run/docker.sock
        type: Socket
    - name: docker-storage
      emptyDir:
        sizeLimit: 50Gi
    - name: workspace
      persistentVolumeClaim:
        claimName: cicd-workspace-pvc
    - name: docker-config
      secret:
        secretName: docker-config-json
        items:
          - key: .dockerconfigjson
            path: config.json
  restartPolicy: OnFailure
  terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
  activeDeadlineSeconds: 3600
  nodeSelector:
    node-role.kubernetes.io/build: "true"
  tolerations:
    - key: "dedicated"
      operator: "Equal"
      value: "cicd"
      effect: "NoSchedule"
  affinity:
    nodeAffinity:
      requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
        nodeSelectorTerms:
          - matchExpressions:
              - key: kubernetes.io/arch
                operator: In
                values:
                  - amd64
    podAntiAffinity:
      preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
        - weight: 100
          podAffinityTerm:
            labelSelector:
              matchExpressions:
                - key: app
                  operator: In
                  values:
                    - docker-builder
            topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
